# Foxit Cloud API MCP TestCase 

Foxit Cloud API are a comprehensive suite of **RESTful cloud-based APIs** built on Foxit’s  
industry-leading document processing technology and scalable cloud infrastructure, enabling  
developers to integrate robust PDF, eSign, and document automation capabilities directly into  
applications, platforms, and workflows. 
## Core API Suite 
Foxit Cloud API ecosystem consists of four primary API modules, covering the full document  
lifecycle: 
### 1. PDF Services API 
A server-side API for automated, high-volume PDF processing. 
- **Core Functions**: PDF creation/conversion (Word, Excel, HTML ↔ PDF), compression,  
splitting/merging, content redaction, optimization, linearization, and data extraction (text, tables,  
structured fields). 
- **Use Cases**: Batch document processing, back-end workflow automation, compliance  
archiving, and data parsing for BI/AI pipelines. 

### 2. Document Generation API 
Enables dynamic document creation from structured data and templates. 
- **Core Functions**: Generate branded PDFs/DOCX from JSON/CRM/form data; populate  
templates with variables (names, pricing, tables); automate contracts, invoices, reports, and  
disclosures. 
- **Use Cases**: Personalized document delivery, on-demand report generation, and scalable  
template-driven document production. 

### 3. eSign API 
API-first electronic signature workflow automation. 
- **Core Functions**: Trigger signing flows, embed signature experiences, manage signer  
identities/roles, capture consent, maintain tamper-evident audit trails, and ensure compliance with  
eIDAS/ESIGN Act. 
- **Use Cases**: End-to-end contract signing, consent collection, and legally binding digital  
signature integration. 

### 4. PDF Embed API 
Lightweight in-app PDF viewing and interaction. 
- **Core Functions**: Embed customizable PDF viewers with annotations, form-filling, collaboration, 
and access control; no plugins/downloads required. 
- **Use Cases**: In-portal document review, customer-facing PDF previews, and collaborative  
annotation workflows. 

## Key Platform Features 
- **Developer-Centric**: Clean REST design, real-time sandbox, pre-built workflows, full  
documentation, SDKs, and live code demos. 
- **Enterprise-Grade Security**: TLS 1.2+/AES-256 encryption (in transit/rest), RBAC, PKI  
signatures, SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, and compliance with HIPAA, GDPR, FERPA, CCPA, 21  
CFR Part 11. 
- **Scalability**: Cloud-native architecture for high-volume processing with no infrastructure  
overhead. 
- **End-to-End Coverage**: Unified platform for document generation → processing → signing →  
archival. 

## Getting Started 
1. Create a free developer account for API keys, docs, and tools. 
2. Test via live demos and generate code snippets. 
3. Integrate into your stack and deploy workflows.
